name: date-calculator-ai-mcp
description: MCP server for date calculator ai. Features days between, add business days, next weekday. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: days_between
tools.description: Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Also returns weeks, months estimate, and business days.

tools.name: add_business_days
tools.description: Add business days to a date, optionally excluding holidays (comma-separated YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: next_weekday
tools.description: Find the next occurrence of a weekday. target_day: Monday-Sunday. occurrence: nth occurrence (1-52).

tools.name: format_date
tools.description: Parse and reformat dates. Common formats: %Y-%m-%d, %d/%m/%Y, %m/%d/%Y, %B %d %Y, %A %B %d %Y, %Y%m%d, ISO8601.
